step.name: define-agent-rbac
step.action: Create role with Deny-by-default; enumerate read allowlist.

step.name: define-write-allowlist
step.action: List write verbs the agent may perform (with approval token).

step.name: wire-token-verifier
step.action: Configure verifier endpoint; bind to write actions.

step.name: install-revert-script
step.action: Script reverts agent permissions to default at incident close.

step.name: audit-ratchet
step.action: Initialise audit log; first writes recorded per action class.
